results.rendered_html: sūrya—kānta m. ‘sun-loved’, the sun-stone, sun-crystal (a kind of crystal supposed to possess fabulous properties as giving out heat when exposed to the sun; there is a corresponding moonstone See candra-k˚; also ˚ta-maṇi),  MBh. ;  Kāv. ;  VarYogay.

results.rendered_html:
sūryakānta m.  AK. 3,6,2,16 .
1〉 ein best. stark funkelnder Edelstein  H. 1067 .  HALĀY. 2,21 .  RĀJAN. 13,207 .  MBH. 12,7909 .  RAGH. 11,21 .  Spr. (II) 6403 .
— 2〉 eine best. Blume  ŚABDAC. _im_ ŚKDR.  unter sūryamaṇi; vgl. sūryakānti.
— 3〉 N. pr. eines Berges  MĀRK. P. 59,22 .
— Vgl. candrakānta.
